summary: Verified Emanator AI Builder major UI redesign of workspace view. All 12 test items passed: login works, API health check returns healthy, dashboard loads with project grid, glass panels with rounded-[2rem] corners present, LeftPanel has no em-glass-sidebar class, RightPanel has no em-aurora classes, workspace tabs row with pill-shaped buttons visible, preview toolbar with Deploy button present, ResizableHandle styled as transparent gap, dead renderWorkspaceTabs function removed, isSimpleFrontendEdit returns true for subscription box landing page, and all modules compile successfully.

isSimpleFrontendEdit_subscription_box.input: Build a landing page with subscription box pricing

em_glass_sidebar_removed_from_LeftPanel.details: grep confirms em-glass-sidebar NOT FOUND in LeftPanel.jsx

em_aurora_removed_from_RightPanel.details: grep confirms em-aurora NOT FOUND in RightPanel.jsx

renderWorkspaceTabs_removed_from_Dashboa.details: grep confirms renderWorkspaceTabs NOT FOUND in Dashboard.jsx

ResizableHandle_transparent_gap.classes: w-1 bg-transparent hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full

login_flow.details: Login successful via Supabase Auth (Enter key submission)

dashboard_load.details: Dashboard loads with prompt bar, project grid, model selectors (E-1, Ultra, Claude 4.5 Opus)

workspace_view.details: Workspace view renders correctly after project creation with all new UI elements

workspace_tabs_row.details: Pill-shaped tabs visible: Project Bin, [Project Name], New Conversation

preview_toolbar.details: Preview toolbar with tabs: Preview, Code, Assets, Logs, Export, Deploy

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx correctly implements em-glass wrapper divs with rounded-[2rem] for glassmorphism effect
LeftPanel.jsx no longer has em-glass-sidebar class - wrapper now handles glass styling
RightPanel.jsx simplified to flex flex-col without redundant aurora background
Dead renderWorkspaceTabs function successfully removed from Dashboard.jsx
COMPLEX_DISQUALIFIERS in intents.js correctly allows 'subscription box' content while blocking actual payment integrations
ResizableHandle styled as transparent gap (w-1 bg-transparent) for clean panel separation

success_rate.backend: 100% (all syntax checks, health check, and function tests passed)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard load, and workspace view all working)

seed_data_creation: Created 'UI Test Project' for workspace view testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified the major UI redesign of workspace view. All glass panels with rounded-[2rem] corners are present, workspace tabs row with pill-shaped buttons works, preview toolbar with Deploy button is visible, and aurora shows through the glass panels. The workspace layout only renders when selectedProject AND selectedChat are set - creating a new project automatically creates a chat and enters workspace view.
